upanibandhana (von bandh mit upani)
1〉 adj. offenbarend, an den Tag legend; karmāṇi cātmamahimopanibandhanāni  BHĀG. P. 2,7,26 . ātmano mahimā upanibadhyate abhivyajyate yeṣu tāni Schol.
— 2〉 das Schildern, Beschreiben  SĀH. D. 295,2 .
